original_question: A very special island is inhabited only by knights and knaves. Knights always tell the truth, and knaves always lie. You meet 4 inhabitants: Logan, Aurora, Harper, and Jackson. "Aurora is a knave and Jackson is a knave," Logan mentioned. "Jackson is not a knave," Aurora declared. Harper noted, "Harper is a knight". "If Logan is a knave then Harper is a knave," Jackson mentioned. So who is a knight and who is a knave?
